race.comment: Wide open race with a host of chances and a big contingent from the Healey stable with four acceptors. Interesting to see who he lines up. GAGNANTE ENCHERE (7) was a fast-finishing winner fresh then not far away in a Class 3 at Eagle Farm in the latest. Has placed 2/2 when third-up and looks well placed this line-up. RUSTIC TZAR (3) is top pick for the Healey yard after TORONESS comes out. Handy gelding who has been freshened since a close-up sixth on the Sunny Coast. Has strong claims in this lineup off the inside draw. Stablemate ITZA MOTZA (17) is another knocking on the door and looks a win chance now gaining a start. ARAMINTA (6) won only try course and distance and is capable of a bold return. Another Healey runner PACIERA (8) was a dominant winner latest and can only be fitter.
